label: Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation

node.label: Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation
node.definition: Quantization-aware training and low-precision adaptation expose a model to restricted numeric formats during optimization so deployment error is reduced.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation is modeled as depending on Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Numerical analysis and feeding downstream nodes such as Quantized inference & compressed deployment.
